title: Mets play Billy Joel’s ‘We Didn’t Start the Fire’ as brush burns. Turns out they did start the fire
summary: A brush fire was ignited by fireworks at NBT Bank Stadium on July 24, 2025, after a Syracuse Mets game. The fire was quickly extinguished by the Syracuse Fire Department with no injuries or property damage. This was the third fire incident in approximately 300 fireworks shows over 12 years, occurring during an unusually hot and dry July.
processing_notes: Article is dated July 25, 2025 but references July 24, 2025 event—dates are internally consistent
No CIO-specific policy implications identified; primarily a public safety incident report
Climate data point (dry conditions) may be relevant to sustainability/climate resilience planning
Venue is private entity (Mets organization), not direct city infrastructure, but city fire services were deployed
